title: pelargonium reptans
intro: Pelargonium reptans, also known as Hooker's peeling geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the geranium family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium reptans include alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, soothing digestive issues, and reducing stress and anxiety. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
